data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the outcome of the persona scenario involving admin actions being logged and alerted. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of logging and alerting mechanisms in the system. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any specific references to the necessary endpoints or behaviors that would confirm the expected outcome, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of logging and alerting functionality for admin actions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify logging and alerting for admin actions.
